name: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code
scenarioId: providerregister:Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code
methodName: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code

testSteps.description: 1: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code ({adminEmail=juan.admin@correo.com, adminPassword=password, firstName=Carlos, lastName=Ramirez, providerEmail=pruebasp@proveedor.com, password=Secure@123, phone=3001234567, serviceType=SALON, serviceDescription=Servicio de salon de fiestas})

children.description: Given the admin is logged in with "juan.admin@correo.com" and "password"
Admin executes a POST on the resource /api/users/login

restQuery.responseHeaders:
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 0
Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate
Pragma: no-cache
Expires: 0
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Content-Type: application/json
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Date: Sat, 30 May 2026 05:15:49 GMT
Keep-Alive: timeout=60
Connection: keep-alive

children.description: When the admin generates a provider code for registration
Admin executes a POST on the resource /api/provider-codes

restQuery.responseHeaders:
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 0
Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate
Pragma: no-cache
Expires: 0
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Content-Type: application/json
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Date: Sat, 30 May 2026 05:15:49 GMT
Keep-Alive: timeout=60
Connection: keep-alive

children.description: And the provider registers with first name "Carlos", last name "Ramirez", email "pruebasp@proveedor.com", password "Secure@123", phone "3001234567", service type "SALON" and service description "Servicio de salon de fiestas"
Provider executes a POST on the resource /api/users/register/proveedor

restQuery.responseHeaders:
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 0
Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate
Pragma: no-cache
Expires: 0
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Content-Type: application/json
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Date: Sat, 30 May 2026 05:15:50 GMT
Keep-Alive: timeout=60
Connection: keep-alive

children.description: Then the provider registration status should be 200
And the response contains the registered provider email "pruebasp@proveedor.com"
And the registered provider has an assigned id
Then response body should be not null

title: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code

dataTable.scenarioOutline:
Given the admin is logged in with "<adminEmail>" and "<adminPassword>"
When the admin generates a provider code for registration
And the provider registers with first name "<firstName>", last name "<lastName>", email "<providerEmail>", password "<password>", phone "<phone>", service type "<serviceType>" and service description "<serviceDescription>"
Then the provider registration status should be 200
And the response contains the registered provider email "<providerEmail>"
And the registered provider has an assigned id

scenarioOutline:
Given the admin is logged in with "<adminEmail>" and "<adminPassword>"
When the admin generates a provider code for registration
And the provider registers with first name "<firstName>", last name "<lastName>", email "<providerEmail>", password "<password>", phone "<phone>", service type "<serviceType>" and service description "<serviceDescription>"
Then the provider registration status should be 200
And the response contains the registered provider email "<providerEmail>"
And the registered provider has an assigned id
